description:
CSC ICICI LOMBARD Bike Third Party Insurance | ICICI LOMBARD Insurance KYC | ICICI lombard insurance #icicilombard 

ICICI Lombard offers bike insurance, also known as two-wheeler insurance, to provide coverage for motorcycles, scooters, and other two-wheeled vehicles. Their bike insurance policies offer protection against various risks and provide financial assistance in case of accidents, theft, or damage to the insured vehicle.

ICICI Lombard's bike insurance policies typically provide the following coverage options:

Third-Party Liability Coverage: This is a mandatory coverage as per Indian law and protects you against any legal liability arising due to third-party injuries, death, or property damage caused by your bike.

Own Damage Coverage: This coverage is optional and protects your own bike against damages due to accidents, natural disasters, theft, fire, and vandalism.

Personal Accident Cover: It provides financial compensation in case of accidental death or disability of the insured owner/driver of the bike.

Add-On Covers: ICICI Lombard also offers additional add-on covers that can be purchased with the base policy to enhance the coverage, such as zero depreciation cover, roadside assistance, engine protection, and more.

It's important to note that the specific terms, conditions, coverage options, and premium rates may vary depending on the policy you choose and other factors such as the make and model of your bike, the location, and your personal details.

To get a quote and detailed information about ICICI Lombard's bike insurance policies, it is best to visit their official website or contact their customer service directly. They will be able to provide you with accurate and up-to-date information specific to your requirements.
